title: Teaching Role
description: Pedagogical function played by a chunk within a course: introduce, elaborate, reinforce, assess, transfer, synthesize. Emitted on Trainforge chunks after alignment (align_chunks.py), and intended to be emitted directly by Courseforge in Wave 2 via a deterministic mapping from data-cf-component + data-cf-purpose tuples.
$comment: Values lifted from Trainforge/align_chunks.py:33 (VALID_ROLES set: introduce, elaborate, reinforce, assess, transfer, synthesize). The x-component-mapping array encodes the deterministic mapping from Courseforge data-cf-component + data-cf-purpose values (observed in Courseforge/scripts/generate_course.py:345, :374, :487) to teaching_role values. This mapping will be consumed by Worker H in Wave 2 when teaching_role emission is wired into the Courseforge generator.

component.description: Value of the data-cf-component HTML attribute.

purpose.description: Value of the data-cf-purpose HTML attribute.

source.description: Source citation (file:line) where the component+purpose pair is emitted.
